ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Habitus in aedibus D. Hieronymi Brasavoli die Lunae 21 Septembris 1682.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Cesaretti and Dragondelli were the two printers of this volume
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur, si videbitur Reverendiss. Patri Magistro Sac. Pal. Apost. I de Ang. Archiep. Urb. Vicesg. Imprimatur, Fr. Dominicus Maria Puteobonellus Ordinis Praedic. Sac. Pal. Apost. Mag.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
